calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Apperance for Plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no objection by appearing counsel. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-18-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Continued To Oct-18-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response
Off Calendar May-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, PLAINTIFF PORTS SEAFOOD INC A CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Response To Discoveryis ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The motion was filed on April 30, 2010. The first day this could have been heard is June 1, 2010. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2010 Set For Trial On Sep-13-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Continued To May-14-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Feb-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nathaniel L. Dunn, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: PORTS SEAFOOD INC A CORPORATION
Alexander Volchegursky, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Globe Eats Inc., Zuppa LLC. and Joey & Eddies's LLC.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. PLAINTIFF PORTS SEAFOOD INC A CORPORATION's Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Globe Eats Inc. is granted in the amount of $6,730.
The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewllett. Not reported.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Feb-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nathaniel L. Dunn, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: PORTS SEAFOOD INC A CORPORATION
Alexander Volchegursky, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Globe Eats Inc., Zuppa LLC. and Joey & Eddies's LLC.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. PLAINTIFF PORTS SEAFOOD INC A CORPORATION Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Zuppa LLC is granted in the amount of $4,128
The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewllett. Not reported.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Feb-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nathaniel L. Dunn, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: PORTS SEAFOOD INC A CORPORATION
Alexander Volchegursky, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Globe Eats Inc., Zuppa LLC. and Joey & Eddies's LLC.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. PLAINTIFF PORTS SEAFOOD INC A CORPORATION Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Joey & Eddie's LLC is granted in the amount of $10,586
The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewllett. Not reported.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Feb-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nathaniel L. Dunn, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: PORTS SEAFOOD INC A CORPORATION
Alexander Volchegursky, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Joseph Manzare

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. PLAINTIFF PORTS SEAFOOD INC A CORPORATION Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Joseph Manzare is denied as there is no evidence which supports a finding that Plaintiff is likely to prevail as to this defendant. Additionally, the request to attach fails to describe with particularity any property of a defendant who is a natural person. Commissioner Everett A. Hewllett. Not reported.
